Flow unit conversion

Source: R/flow_unit.R
flow_unit.Rd

Helper function to convert flow rates between different units.

Usage

flow_unit(
  flow_rate,
  flow_unit = c("m3/s", "l/h", "m3/h", "l/s"),
  operator = c("div", "mult")
)

Arguments

flow_rate

Flow rate value.

flow_unit

Flow measurement unit. Options are "m3/s", "l/h", "m3/h", or "l/s". Default is "m3/s".

operator

Character indicating the operation: "div" to convert to m3/s, "mult" to convert from m3/s.

Value

Converted flow rate.
